response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a accomplished engineer with strong credentials in infrastructure, distributed systems, and technical leadership. However, he falls significantly short on the primary minimum qualification: only 6 months to 1 year of documented C++ professional experience versus the required 8 years. While his microservices expertise at Dunnhumby, cloud infrastructure work at Optilyz, and platform leadership at re:cinq are valuable for a technical leadership role, the absence of deep C++ proficiency makes him unsuitable for this position, which requires C++ as a core technical foundation.
strengths: Extensive distributed systems and microservices experience handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby
Demonstrated technical leadership and mentoring across multiple senior and staff roles, plus founder experience with GISCollective
Strong software craftsmanship practices including TDD, CI/CD, and platform architecture (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, microservices)
concerns: Critical gap: only 6 months to 1 year of documented C++ professional experience versus the required 8 years minimum
Career trajectory shows movement away from C++ toward TypeScript/Node.js ecosystem, contrary to the role's primary technical focus
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) and technical leadership experience is implied rather than explicitly detailed with mentoring scope

key_factors.factor: Technical leadership and platform design experience
